title: Bridge Essay: Associations between Nature Exposure and Health: A Review of the Evidence.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ecology/Animism** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nature connectedness — biophilia hypothesis, nature neuroscience, environmental neuroscience.

**Associations between Nature Exposure and Health: A Review of the Evidence.**. Int J Environ Res Public Health.. PMID: 33946197. DOI: 10.3390/ijerph18094790. There is extensive empirical literature on the association between exposure to nature and health. In this narrative review, we discuss the strength of evidence from recent (i.e., the last decade) experimental and observational studies on nature exposure and health, highlighting research on children and youth where possible. We found evidence for associations between nature exposure and improved cognitive function, brain activity, blood pressure, mental health, physical activity, and sleep. Resul
